meta.metric_primary: VAEP (Decroos et al. 2019, Bransen & Van Haaren 2020)

vaep_v2_model.note: Trained on StatsBomb international + 8 club seasons (no Wyscout)

players.narrative: Neuer produced MORE at Germany Euro 2024 (-0.1425) than at Bayern (-0.2609) (delta +0.1184). Inverse Podolski: the national team context appears more enabling.
Kimmich produced MORE at Germany Euro 2024 (0.1988) than at Bayern (0.0479) (delta +0.1509). Inverse Podolski: the national team context appears more enabling.

Muller showed a clear production drop: per-90 VAEP fell from 0.1150 at Bayern to -0.1382 at Germany Euro 2024 (delta -0.2532). Consistent with the Podolski archetype: thriving in the club network, diminished without it.
Goretzka: insufficient data in one or both contexts.
Musiala produced MORE at Germany Euro 2024 (0.7799) than at Bayern (0.0559) (delta +0.7240). Inverse Podolski: the national team context appears more enabling.

Sane showed a clear production drop: per-90 VAEP fell from 0.1055 at Bayern to 0.0129 at Germany Euro 2024 (delta -0.0926). Consistent with the Podolski archetype: thriving in the club network, diminished without it.
Pavlovic: insufficient data in one or both contexts.
Wirtz produced MORE at Germany Euro 2024 (0.7309) than at Bayern (0.4405) (delta +0.2904). Inverse Podolski: the national team context appears more enabling.

Modric showed a clear production drop: per-90 VAEP fell from 0.2716 at Real Madrid to 0.0441 at Croatia (delta -0.2275). Consistent with the Podolski archetype: thriving in the club network, diminished without it.
Kroos produced MORE at Germany (0.5818) than at Real Madrid (0.1717) (delta +0.4101). Inverse Podolski: the national team context appears more enabling.
Varane produced MORE at France (0.1768) than at Real Madrid (-0.0288) (delta +0.2056). Inverse Podolski: the national team context appears more enabling.
Benzema produced MORE at France (0.7529) than at Real Madrid (0.0121) (delta +0.7408). Inverse Podolski: the national team context appears more enabling.

Messi showed a clear production drop: per-90 VAEP fell from 0.9910 at Barcelona to 0.2813 at Argentina (delta -0.7097). Consistent with the Podolski archetype: thriving in the club network, diminished without it.
Busquets: insufficient data in one or both contexts.
JordiAlba produced MORE at Spain (0.2585) than at Barcelona (0.1684) (delta +0.0901). Inverse Podolski: the national team context appears more enabling.

Mbappe showed a clear production drop: per-90 VAEP fell from 0.8203 at PSG to 0.7619 at France (delta -0.0584). Consistent with the Podolski archetype: thriving in the club network, diminished without it.

Neymar showed a clear production drop: per-90 VAEP fell from 0.5533 at PSG to 0.4061 at Brazil (delta -0.1472). Consistent with the Podolski archetype: thriving in the club network, diminished without it.

Messi showed a clear production drop: per-90 VAEP fell from 0.5342 at PSG to 0.2813 at Argentina (delta -0.2529). Consistent with the Podolski archetype: thriving in the club network, diminished without it.

Hakimi showed a clear production drop: per-90 VAEP fell from 0.2621 at PSG to 0.1523 at Morocco (delta -0.1098). Consistent with the Podolski archetype: thriving in the club network, diminished without it.

inter_miami_argentina.headline: Inter Miami MLS 2023 -> Argentina Copa 2024
inter_miami_argentina.note: Messi joined July 2023; partial MLS season. Copa 2024 held in USA.

players.narrative: Messi showed a clear production drop: per-90 VAEP fell from 0.2390 at Inter Miami to 0.1886 at Argentina Copa 2024 (delta -0.0504). Consistent with the Podolski archetype: thriving in the club network, diminished without it.
